name: taiwan-legal-plugin
description: Taiwan legal open-data plugins for Claude Code — court judgments and the National Regulation Database, via the open-source mcp-taiwan-legal-db MCP server.

plugins.name: taiwan-legal
plugins.description: Access layer for Taiwan legal open data: court judgments (judicial.gov.tw) and the National Regulation Database (law.moj.gov.tw). Bundles the open-source mcp-taiwan-legal-db MCP server. Use when you need to search and retrieve Taiwanese court rulings or statutory text.
